message:
fix(auth): return JWT token in /auth/refresh response body

The RefreshToken handler was changed in #6590 to stop returning the
token in the JSON body (only setting the HttpOnly cookie). But the
AuthCallback component needs the token in the response to call
setToken() and refreshUser(). This mismatch caused every OAuth login
to fail with token_exchange_failed.

Restores the token field in the response while keeping the HttpOnly
cookie for session persistence.

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
